blocking_findings.claim: Test comment at lines 9-10 asserts the tests catch production code drift. Test file does not import from stage1.run_phase_a. All four tests call an inline shadow copy _run_grid_intersection_check (lines 25-85), not the production code at run_phase_a.py:702-770. CI will remain green after any production code change; the false-assurance comment misleads future contributors.
blocking_findings.required_fix: Extract the grid-intersection check from run_phase_a.py:702-770 into a module-level helper function (e.g., _check_grid_intersection(rows, run_dir) or similar). Import it from run_phase_a in both the production call site and the test file. Delete _run_grid_intersection_check from test file. Correct or remove the false comment at lines 9-10. No behavior change; no spec deviation; no new files required.

non_blocking_findings.note: Non-atomic write to phase_a_summary.json in Tier 2 path (open-w truncates before json.dump completes); SIGKILL leaves empty file. Primary CSVs and manifest unaffected. Fix with tmp+os.replace if desired.
except Exception swallows FileNotFoundError if phase_a_summary.json missing; warning lost silently. Backstopped by sanity-check RuntimeError at line 780-781.

1e-3 tolerance is ~10x headroom over analytical flash-attn2 deviation (~1e-4 mean over 250 fp32 samples). Defensible; 5e-3 would be more conservative. Empirical confirmation recommended before full run.
No positive clean-pass key in phase_a_summary.json; absence of grid_intersection_fld_warning ambiguates clean-pass from skipped.

routing: Codex agree-block always wins per CLAUDE.md. Pipeline halts. Route AV5-ADV-BLOCK to writer for r4. Scope: extract production helper + fix test imports + remove false comment only.
